name: Cheesy Popover Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water, butter, salt, and pepper to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Add flour quickly, all at once, beating with a wooden spoon until the mixture forms a ball that leaves sides of the pan.
3. Remove from heat. Add eggs to the flour mixture one at a time, beating well after each addition (the mixture will separate as each egg is added).
4. Set aside 2 tablespoons diced Cheddar cheese; stir remaining cheese into the flour mixture.
5. Drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls (about 11) onto a greased baking sheet to form an 8-inch ring, leaving a 2-1/2 to 3-inch diameter hole in the center.
6. Sprinkle reserved cheese over top.
7. Bake at 425 degrees for 50 to 55 minutes or until puffy and golden brown. Serve hot.
